title: User Login Flow
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid email and password credentials
steps: Enter valid email in the email field
Enter valid password in the password field
Verify JWT token is stored in session
expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the dashboard with a valid JWT token

title: User Registration Flow
description: Verify that a new user can successfully register with email, password, and role selection
steps: Select user role (Agent, Manager, or Admin)
Verify automatic redirect to login or dashboard
expected_result: New user account is created successfully and user can log in

title: Invalid Login Credentials Handling
description: Verify that the system displays an error message when invalid credentials are provided
expected_result: Authentication error message is displayed and user remains on login page

title: Agent Dashboard Access
description: Verify that authenticated agents can view their dashboard with personal metrics
steps: Verify dashboard shows callbacks, transfers, and sales metrics
Verify personal dashboard items are visible
expected_result: Agent dashboard loads successfully with relevant data

title: Create Customer Record
description: Verify that agents can create a new customer record with required fields
steps: Verify customer appears in customer list
expected_result: New customer record is created and visible in the customer list

title: Add Electricity Meter to Customer
description: Verify that agents can add electricity meter details to a customer profile
steps: Navigate to a customer detail page
Find and click 'Add Electricity Meter' button
Enter standing charge and monthly bill
expected_result: Electricity meter is added to customer profile and displayed in meter list

title: AI Extraction from Call Notes
description: Verify that agents can use AI to extract utility information from unstructured call notes
steps: Navigate to AI Form Filler or similar component
Paste unstructured call notes into text area
Wait for AI to process the request
Verify structured data is extracted and displayed
Verify extraction shows meter details, rates, and supplier information
expected_result: AI successfully extracts utility information from call notes

title: Schedule Callback
description: Verify that agents can schedule callbacks for customers with pricing offers
steps: Add pricing offer (contract length, supplier, rates)
Verify callback appears in callbacks list with pending status
expected_result: Callback is scheduled successfully and visible in callbacks list

title: View Callback Details
description: Verify that agents can view detailed information about a scheduled callback
steps: Login as an Agent with existing callbacks
Click on a callback from the list
Verify all callback information is displayed (customer, date, pricing offers)
expected_result: Callback detail page displays all relevant information

title: Create Transfer Request
description: Verify that agents can create transfer requests for utility accounts
steps: Enter transfer details (new supplier, contract terms)
Enter banking information (Sort Code, Account Number)
Verify transfer request appears in transfers list
expected_result: Transfer request is created and visible in transfers list

title: Manager Team Dashboard Access
description: Verify that managers can view their team dashboard with agent metrics
steps: Verify manager dashboard displays team metrics
Verify manager can see agent list and performance data
expected_result: Manager dashboard loads with team-level metrics and overview

title: Manager View Agent List
description: Verify that managers can view and manage their team agents
steps: Verify list of agents is displayed
Verify agent performance metrics are shown
Verify manager can click on an agent to view details
expected_result: Agent list page displays all team agents with their metrics

title: Manager View Team Callbacks
description: Verify that managers can monitor team callbacks
steps: Verify list of team callbacks is displayed
Verify callbacks show agent name, customer, and status
Verify manager can click callback to view details
expected_result: Team callbacks list displays all callbacks with agent attribution

title: Admin Dashboard Access
description: Verify that admin users can access the admin dashboard
steps: Verify platform-wide analytics and metrics are displayed
Verify admin navigation menu is visible
expected_result: Admin dashboard loads successfully with platform metrics

title: Admin Manager Management
description: Verify that admins can manage manager accounts
steps: Verify list of managers is displayed
Verify admin can create/edit/disable manager accounts
expected_result: Admin can manage manager accounts successfully

title: Profile Settings Update
description: Verify that users can update their profile settings
expected_result: Profile settings are updated successfully

title: Sales Application Submission
description: Verify that agents can submit finalized sales applications
steps: Enter banking information (Sort Code, Account Number)
Verify success message and sale appears in sales list
expected_result: Sales application is submitted successfully

title: View Sales List
description: Verify that users can view their sales applications
steps: Verify list of sales applications is displayed
Verify sales show customer, status, and submission date
Verify user can click on a sale to view details
expected_result: Sales list displays all submitted applications

title: Unauthorized Access Prevention
description: Verify that unauthorized users cannot access protected routes
steps: Without logging in, navigate directly to /dashboard
expected_result: All protected routes redirect to login page for unauthorized users

title: Role-Based Access Control
description: Verify that users can only access routes appropriate for their role
steps: Logout and login as a Manager
Verify Manager has access to /manager routes
expected_result: Role-based access control is properly enforced
